meta-description: Health programs available to American Indians and Alaska Natives living in urban areas
title: Urban Indian programs
excerpt: Health programs available to American Indians and Alaska Natives living in urban areas.
content:
Health programs available to American Indians and Alaska Natives living in urban areas.

Urban health programs serve:

  • Members or descendants of federally recognized tribes, bands, or other organized groups of Indians, including those tribes, bands, or groups terminated since 1940
  • Members or descendants (in the first or second degree) of state recognized tribes
  • Eskimos, Aleuts, other Alaska Natives, or their descendants

Related content
